claim_readout_map.claim_text: The manuscript claims the assay decisively establishes a new biological mechanism.
claim_readout_map.readout_supports: Mechanism-specific signal if controls and QC pass.
claim_readout_map.qc_gate: Positive control and negative control must bracket the assay signal with predefined pass/fail threshold.
claim_readout_map.failure_mode: An unvalidated parameter could create a false-positive mechanism signal.
claim_readout_map.manuscript_impact: The claim remains plausible but cannot be treated as decisively supported.
